ddls:
CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the continent the country belongs to */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the region belongs to */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the office belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the office belongs to */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office value for the office */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the office */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who manages the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Current unemployment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_density" (
  "office_density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office density calculation */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the office density calculation belongs to */,
  "office_count" INTEGER /* Number of offices in the country */,
  "avg_office_density" REAL /* Average office density in the country */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_density_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continent_statistics" (
  "continent_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent statistic */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the continent the statistic belongs to */,
  "total_offices" INTEGER /* Total number of offices in the continent */,
  "avg_box_office" REAL /* Average box office value in the continent */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the continent */,
  "total_gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_continent_statistics_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_statistics" (
  "country_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the statistic belongs to */,
  "total_offices" INTEGER /* Total number of offices in the country */,
  "avg_box_office" REAL /* Average box office value in the country */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "total_gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_statistics" (
  "region_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region statistic */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the statistic belongs to */,
  "total_offices" INTEGER /* Total number of offices in the region */,
  "avg_box_office" REAL /* Average box office value in the region */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "total_gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_mappings" (
  "office_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office mapping */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_mappings_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_mappings_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continent_office_density" (
  "continent_office_density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent office density calculation */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the continent the office density calculation belongs to */,
  "total_offices" INTEGER /* Total number of offices in the continent */,
  "avg_office_density" REAL /* Average office density in the continent */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_office_density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_continent_office_density_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_office_density" (
  "country_office_density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country office density calculation */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the office density calculation belongs to */,
  "total_offices" INTEGER /* Total number of offices in the country */,
  "avg_office_density" REAL /* Average office density in the country */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_office_density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_office_density_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_office_density" (
  "region_office_density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region office density calculation */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the office density calculation belongs to */,
  "total_offices" INTEGER /* Total number of offices in the region */,
  "avg_office_density" REAL /* Average office density in the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_office_density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_office_density_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
